Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 121 

PRVDR_NUM_SYS 

LABEL: Provider Number System/Nomenclature 

DESCRIPTION: A code to identify the kind of provider identifier that is captured in the PRVDR_NUM data element. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_NUM_SYS 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_NUM_SYS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR Identifiers 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 1: State-specific Medicaid provider ID 
2:
